description_long: This sculpture features three life-sized soldiers standing back-to-back atop a robust, multi-tiered stone pedestal. The figures are dressed in military uniforms with berets and are equipped with rifles slung over their shoulders, evoking a sense of vigilance and camaraderie. The soldiers' postures are upright and resolute, with detailed facial features and clothing folds rendered in a weathered, greenish patina typical of bronze. The stone base is octagonal and constructed from large, rough-hewn blocks, with several plaques affixed to its sides. At the foot of the pedestal, red wreaths or floral tributes are visible, suggesting a commemorative or memorial function. The sculpture is set on a paved surface, indicating an outdoor public installation.
description: A bronze sculpture of three soldiers standing back-to-back on a stone pedestal, with military attire and rifles, set in a public paved area.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backs of two soldiers and the stone pedestal, with a plaque and a red wreath visible on the ground.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlighting the faces and chests of two soldiers, the rifles, and the inscription 'UNITED WE CONQUER' on the pedestal.
description_view_2: Front-right view focusing on the detailed faces and uniforms of the soldiers, with the stone base and plaques visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the backs and profiles of the soldiers, the stone pedestal, and another red wreath on the ground.
attribute_subject_matter: three military soldiers in uniform standing on a memorial pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved stone surface, likely in a public plaza or memorial area.
